headline: A Look At CSX (CSX) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot for CSX (CSX) CSX (CSX) has been in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$45.66 and recording returns of 4.4% over the past year and 25.9% year to date. See our latest analysis for CSX. CSX’s recent share price moves have been relatively steady, with a 30-day share price return of 5.4% and a 90-day share price return of 11.7%.
